DataType.Name: ORT_Vision_Camera_Results
DataType.Description: Inspection results from the vision system to the PLC

Member.Name: iResultCode
Member.Description: The result code of the inspection - 0 is good and any other value is an error

Member.Name: dblResults
Member.Description: The real results from the inspection

Member.Name: strResults
Member.Description: The string result from the inspection
